summary: Applied ADR 0240 on the live interactive ops portal by adding Apache ECharts-backed health, topology, coordination, and rollout panels, mirroring the canonical dependency graph into the runtime, and re-verifying the local and edge operator entrypoints from the isolated worktree.

verification.observed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/ops_portal/app.py`, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with-requirements requirements/ops-portal.txt python -m pytest -q tests/test_interactive_ops_portal.py`, `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with-requirements requirements/ops-portal.txt python -m pytest -q tests/test_ops_portal.py`, `make syntax-check-ops-portal`, `make validate-data-models`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards` all passed from the isolated worktree before the live replay.
`make converge-ops-portal` completed successfully from `/Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.worktrees/ws-0240-live-apply` with `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=99 changed=4 failed=0`.

Over the Proxmox jump path to `ops@10.10.10.20`, `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/health` returned `{"status":"ok"}`, `docker ps --filter name=ops-portal --format "{{.Image}} {{.Status}}"` reported `lv3-ops-portal:latest Up ... (healthy)`, `/opt/ops-portal/data/config/dependency-graph.json` existed, and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/static/portal.js | sed -n '1,12p'` returned the new chart bootstrap script.

verification.check: Guest-local chart panels and inline ECharts options
verification.observed: `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/overview` included `Current service-state distribution`, `Ops portal dependency map`, `overview-health-mix-chart`, and `overview-dependency-focus-chart`; `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/agents` included `Session states at a glance` and `agent-coordination-status-chart`; and `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8092/partials/changelog` included `Recent rollout tempo` and `live-apply-timeline-chart`.

`curl -k -I https://ops.lv3.org` returned `302` to `https://ops.lv3.org/oauth2/sign_in?rd=https://ops.lv3.org/`, preserved the expected hardening headers, and advertised `content-security-policy: ... script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://unpkg.com; ...`, which allows the committed ECharts runtime source.

notes: The live replay happened before this receipt was committed, but the deployable portal sources in commit `f3223e95ce1836e9f233256001bade9ba23c236f` match the replayed branch state; this receipt commit only records evidence and branch-local metadata.
The guest-local coordination chart rendered zero active sessions at verification time because no agent sessions were currently published, not because the panel failed to initialize.
Canonical repo-version and platform-version bumps still require the merged-main integration step and a replay from `main` per repository policy.
